name: @uniswap/v4-agentforge-demo
description: AgentForge-powered Uniswap v4 in-repo simulation demos

scripts.uniswap:v4:llm: tsx scripts/require-live-llm-env.ts && LLM_LIVE_REQUIRED=1 LLM_GOSSIP_FORCE_PROVIDER=1 SIMULATION_MODE=exploration tsx scenarios/uniswap/v4-flagship-llm-exploration.ts
scripts.uniswap:v4:llm:short: tsx scripts/require-live-llm-env.ts && LLM_LIVE_REQUIRED=1 LLM_GOSSIP_FORCE_PROVIDER=1 SIMULATION_MODE=exploration SIM_SHORT_RUN=1 SIM_SHORT_TICKS=18 SIM_SHORT_TICK_SECONDS=120 tsx scenarios/uniswap/v4-flagship-llm-exploration.ts
scripts.uniswap:v4:smoke: npm run uniswap:v4:deterministic && npm run uniswap:v4:llm:deterministic
scripts.uniswap:v4:stability: SIM_RUN_TAG=stable_a tsx scenarios/uniswap/v4-flagship-deterministic.ts && SIM_RUN_TAG=stable_b tsx scenarios/uniswap/v4-flagship-deterministic.ts && tsx scripts/validate-uniswap-consistency.ts --scenario uniswap-v4-flagship-deterministic --tag-a stable_a --tag-b stable_b
